name: Yanbu Cement Company
summary: Yanbu Cement Company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacturing, producing, and trading in cement and related products in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company offers ordinary Portland, Pozzolana Portland, hydraulic, and sulphate resistance cement products. It also manufactures cement bags. Yanbu Cement Company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Jeddah, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
